original text:
I. WHO IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE TREATMENT OF YOUR PERSONAL DATA?
II. WHAT PURPOSE DO WE TREAT YOUR DATA?
Through this website, we only deal with the personal data that you provide us in the forms of queries, when signing up for job offers, when downloading materials, when subscribing to the blog and / or contacting us, exclusively with the purpose of sending you the requested information, pointing to the job market and / or resolving any doubts or questions that arise; and, if you have expressly consented to it, to send you electronic communications regarding our activities or services.
To that end, and in order to comply with these purposes, it is important that you inform us of any changes that may occur in your personal data in order to keep them up to date. Otherwise, we are not responsible for their veracity.
Manage the contracting of services through the web, as well as billing and delivery.
Periodically send electronic communications about services, events and news related to our professional activity, unless otherwise indicated or the user opposes or revoke their consent.
To periodically send commercial and / or promotional information related to the contracted services and value added sector to the end users, unless otherwise indicated or the user opposes or revoke their consent.
Make anonymous statistical reports regarding the access habits and the activity developed by the users in our web.
To elaborate a commercial profile of the user and to carry out commercial actions adjusted to the same one, using its data derived from the management of the products acquired (navigation data, access habits, traffic), unless otherwise indicated or the user opposes or revoque consent.
In case you send us your cv or register in the different job offers that we can publish, we will treat your data in order to assess and manage your job application and if necessary, carry out the necessary actions for the selection and hiring of personnel, in order to offer you positions that fit your profile. Unless otherwise noted, the input of the required data is necessary, so that its non-contribution will prevent the continuity of the selection process.
To fulfill the legally established obligations, as well as to verify the fulfillment of the contractual obligations, including the prevention of fraud.
III. FOR HOW LONG WILL WE CONSERVE THEM?
Your data will be kept for the minimum time necessary to satisfy the purpose for which you provided them as well as to attend to the responsibilities that could be derived from the data provided and any other legal requirement.
In this regard, we consider that if you do not oppose the treatment of your data and / or do not expressly cancel them, you are still interested in continuing to be included in our treatments until BUGUROO considers it appropriate and as long as it is suitable for the purpose for which they were obtained..
IV. WHAT IS LEGITIMATION FOR THE TREATMENT OF YOUR DATA?
The information we request is adequate, relevant and strictly necessary and in no case is obliged to provide it, but its non-communication may affect the purpose of the service or the impossibility of providing it.
V. DO WE GET YOUR SOCIAL NETWORK DATA?
BUGUROO is present in Linkedin, Twitter, Google+ and Facebook, in order to inform about the services it offers, as well as any other activity or event that is carried out and wants to be publicized, but at no time will you obtain the same personal data of users interacting with them, unless there is express authorization.
VI. WHICH DESTINATORS WILL WE COMMUNICATE YOUR DATA?
BUGUROO informs the user that its data can be communicated to its collaborating companies, under the same conditions of privacy that oblige the data protection regulations, in order to be able to attend your requests, manage the services you contract and inform you about services, events and news related to our professional activity.
Public administrations with competence in the sectors of activity of BUGUROO, when established by current regulations.
The State Security Forces and Bodies by virtue of what is established in the Law..
Banks and financial institutions for the collection of services provided.
Other professionals in the legal field, when such communication is necessary normatively, or for the execution of contracted services.
VII. WHAT ARE YOUR RIGHTS WHEN WE CAN DO IT?
To revoke the granted consents.
Obtain confirmation as to whether BUGUROO is treating personal data concerning you or not..
Correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
Request the deletion of your data when, among other reasons, the data are no longer necessary for the purposes that were collected.
Obtain from BUGUROO the limitation of the processing of the data when one of the conditions provided for in the data protection regulations is fulfilled.
In certain circumstances and for reasons related to their particular situation to the processing of their data, those interested may oppose the processing of their data. BUGUROO will cease to treat the data, except for compelling legitimate reasons, or the exercise or defense of possible claims.
Obtain human intervention, to express their point of view and to challenge automated decisions to be taken by BUGUROO, if any.
Claim to the Spanish Data Protection Agency, when the interested party considers that BUGUROO has violated the rights that are recognized by the applicable regulations in data protection.
You can exercise your rights of protection of personal data by sending a written communication to the registered office of BUGUROO or to the e-mail authorized for this purpose, dpo@buguroo.com, including in both cases a photocopy of your ID or other equivalent identification document.
VIII. CAN YOU WITHDRAW YOUR CONSENT?
You have the possibility and the right to withdraw consent for any specific purpose granted at the time, without affecting the legality of the treatment based on the consent prior to its withdrawal.
IX. WHERE CAN YOU CLAIM WHEN YOU CONSIDER THAT YOUR DATA ARE NOT ADEQUATELY TREATED?
X. WHAT DO WE DO TO GUARANTEE THE SECURITY AND CONFIDENTIALITY OF YOUR DATA?
In order to safeguard the security of your personal data, we inform you that BUGUROO has taken all necessary technical and organizational measures to guarantee the security of the personal data supplied. All this to avoid its alteration, loss, and / or unauthorized treatments or accesses, as required by the regulations, although absolute security does not exist.
Also, BUGUROO informs you that all our staff, whatever the stage of the treatment in which it takes part, has adopted the commitment to treat your data with the utmost zeal and confidentiality. We remind you that neither BUGUROO, nor any of its employees, will transfer or communicate its data to third parties, except in the cases legally anticipated, or unless you expressly authorize it.
XI. WHAT DATA CATEGORIES DO WE TREAT?
Identifying information: name, surname, postal address, e-mail address, postal code, telephone, city, country, title, company name.
Academic and professional data: training / qualifications, student history, professional experience, membership of professional associations or colleges, in the case of selection processes.
Economic data, or financial, banking (in case of invoicing online).
© BUGUROO OFFENSIVE SECURITY, S.L. All rights reserved.
